name: python3-tempita

description:
very small text templating language - Python 3.x
Tempita is a small and simple Python text templating language mainly used
by Paster (python-pastescript) to roll out new projects.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-tempita --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
